on_screen_text: Priya yaar... [Priya, my friend...] / Aaj neha ne mujhe reject kar diya [Today Neha rejected me] / Maine bola "i am loving since long time" [I said "i am loving since long time"] / Usne hans k bola "pehle English sikh lo" [She laughed and said "learn English first"] / Dost bhi the waha pe... Bahut beizzati hui [Friends were also there... It was very embarrassing] / Arjun, haar mat maan [Arjun, don't give up] / Maine bhi pehle teri jaisi English boli thi [I also used to speak English like you before] / Par MySivi app use karke sab badal gaya [But using MySivi app changed everything] / MySivi??? / Haan! Yahan AI teacher Arya hai [Yes! There is an AI teacher named Arya here] / Roz bas 15 minute usse baat karo, bilkul dost ki tarah [Just talk to her for 15 minutes daily, just like a friend] / Galti hui? Judge nahi karti, sirf correct karti hai [Made a mistake? She doesn't judge, she only corrects] / Matlab abh bhi hope hai?? [Does that mean there is still hope??] / Bilkul! [Absolutely!] / 2 hafte practice kar... teri English itni improve hogi ki Neha khud impressed ho jayegi [Practice for 2 weeks... your English will improve so much that Neha herself will be impressed] / Par ye toh expensive hoga na? [But this must be expensive, right?] / nhi, Sirf ₹1! [No, only ₹1!] / Wow! / Mai bhi abhi download karta hu [I am downloading it right now] / 2 hafte baad neha ko perfect English me propose karunga [After 2 weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English] / All the best! MySivi download kar aur shuru ho ja [All the best! Download MySivi and get started] / Great! Download MySivi. I'll see you there!
summary: A simulated WhatsApp conversation shows Arjun sharing his embarrassment after being rejected by Neha due to poor English. Priya recommends MySivi, an AI-powered English tutor app that corrects mistakes without judgment for just ₹1. Arjun is motivated to download the app immediately to improve his English and propose again.
